{{Infobox character
| name = Xorrus
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Dragon King's left hand, left hand of the Dragon Monarch, Desert-bringer, the Breath of Destruction, the Eternal Sandstorm, Herald
| affiliations = Heralds
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Xorrus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Xorrus is a powerful gold [[dragon]] and a [[Herald]] who serves as the left hand to the [[Dragon Monarch]]. Known by titles such as the Eternal Sandstorm, the Breath of Destruction, and Desert-bringer, she possesses significant influence and territory. In her draconic form, she is capable of devastating attacks, including [[dragon]] breath, and has been known to use lesser [[dragons]] as distractions to strike at her enemies. She is also capable of assuming a flawless human appearance characterized by golden hair and human eyes. Beyond her role as a high-ranking servant of the [[Dragon King]], Xorrus is a family-oriented individual who has shown deep concern for her granddaughter, Sophara. She has demonstrated the ability to intervene in magical processes, such as canceling an advancement to prevent potential harm. Despite her capacity for destruction and a history of seeking revenge, she has also exhibited moments of mercy, such as releasing humans from a trap. Ultimately, her [[life]] and power were subject to the conflicts of higher beings, leading to her eventual death.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Xorrus]] is the [[Dragon King]]'s left hand.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Xorrus]] is the left hand of the [[Dragon Monarch]] and is called Desert-bringer, the Breath of Destruction, the Eternal Sandstorm.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Xorrus]] is a gold [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Xorrus]] was one of the [[Heralds]] who formed the original pact of [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Xorrus]] is Sophara's grandmother and a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Xorrus]] is a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Xorrus]] is someone [[Lindon]] was planning to beat on.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Xorrus]] is a gold [[dragon]] [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fury]] finished off [[Xorrus]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Xorrus]] once had territory in Eastern [[Ashwind]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Xorrus]] grew in power and wreaked revenge on a village.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“Xorrus is only the Dragon King’s left hand.”<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
